title: tecoma fulva subsp. fulva
intro: Tecoma fulva subsp. fulva, also known as the Orange Trumpet Vine or Orange Zebra, is a flowering plant that is native to Mexico and parts of Central America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and supporting digestive health. Tecoma fulva subsp. fulva can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and benefits.
